title: StudioDash Reporting
description: StudioDash reporting for selected-period summaries, trend review, exports, and future scheduled reports.
summary: StudioDash reporting is designed to help developers turn provider data into practical product and business reviews.

sections.heading: Reporting purpose
paragraphs: StudioDash reporting is designed around selected-period summaries, historical trends, and provider-level breakdowns. The aim is to make repeated product reviews easier for independent developers and small studios.
Reporting should help answer practical questions: what changed this week, which product is moving, which provider needs attention, and which area deserves deeper analysis.

sections.heading: Current reporting surfaces
paragraphs: The documented reporting surfaces include dashboard summaries, revenue views, app portfolio metrics, website analytics, SEO signals, and provider health review.
bullets: Selected-period summaries for revenue, downloads, website traffic, and provider metrics where data is available.
Revenue by app, provider, country, and date where supported by provider data.
Website and SEO summaries for Cloudflare and Google Search Console coverage.
Provider health and attention items for operational review.

sections.heading: Roadmap reporting
paragraphs: CSV export, PDF export, scheduled reports, AI summaries, forecasting, and deeper portfolio reporting should be treated as roadmap or tier-linked product direction unless a public release confirms availability.
The website should keep reporting copy public-facing and avoid exposing private project terms or implementation details.
